name: compozy
description: Full-lifecycle development orchestration — design, plan, implement with TDD, review, respond to feedback, and ship with engineering discipline. Flags: --auto (full autopilot), --team (collaborative agents), --worktree (parallel isolation), --repo (multi-repo support).
